creator: jeffclay@gmail.com
text:
Was the goal here to fix the bad version or to rollback the version in ports? The ticket looks like it was reporting 3007 as broken yet the status is "Closed FIXED" despite 3007 not being in ports. 

3006 is about to be EOL. https://docs.saltproject.io/salt/install-guide/en/latest/topics/salt-version-support-lifecycle.html Is work being done elsewhere on getting 3007 working in FreeBSD?
